meta.title: Football Fantasy — Live your league and challenge your friends
meta.description: Follow your league live, create pools with your friends and build your fantasy team. Free and on your phone.

hero.badge: Your league · Your friends · Your team
hero.subtitle: Follow live scores and stats, create pools with your group and build your fantasy team. All in one place, completely free.
hero.note: No cost · No card · Install it on your phone

features.title: Everything you need to live football
features.subtitle: Scores, competition and fun with your people, in a single app.

live.title: Follow your league live
live.body: Standings, fixtures, stats and the team of the week, always up to date.

pools.title: Pools with friends
pools.body: Predict the scores, climb the leaderboard and invite your group with a code.

fantasy.title: Fantasy League
fantasy.body: Build your team, draft your players and design your own crest.

versus.title: Compare and analyze
versus.body: Put two players head to head and find out who performs best.

notifications.title: Instant notifications
notifications.body: Get notified the moment your draft starts or there's news in your league.

pwa.title: Install it as an app
pwa.body: Works on your phone like a native app, no app store required.

how.title: Get started in 3 steps
how.subtitle: In less than a minute you're already competing.

one.title: Create your account
one.body: Sign up for free with your email or Google in seconds.

two.title: Pick your league
two.body: Select your favorite league and start following every matchday.

three.title: Create or join a pool
three.body: Invite your friends with a code and let the best one win.

cta.title: Ready to play?
cta.subtitle: Join for free and prove you know more about football than your friends.

footer.tagline: Live your league. Challenge your friends.
